name: Arcanaeum Institute of Magic (Magic School)
description:
The Arcanaeum Institute of Magic is a prestigious and ancient school dedicated to the study and practice of the arcane arts. Renowned for its unique blend of Gothic architecture and magical influences, the school features floating staircases, hidden rooms, and classrooms that shift locations. Students explore vast, maze-like courtyards and mystical gardens detonated to the elements. With a reputation for producing powerful wizards and witches, the Arcaneum is home to a diverse student body eager to unlock the secrets of magic.

Also, The place the Arcaneum is at is called "Yephoria"
